TextView.android:text: Welcome to Maestro Autoworks. Ready for your next service?
Trusted by Thousands of Filipino Motorists

Founded in 2010, Maestro Autoworks has grown from a small garage in Quezon City into one of the most trusted auto repair shops in Metro Manila. We combine modern diagnostics with old-school craftsmanship — no upsells, no guesswork.
Ready to Book Your Next Appointment?
Skip the queue — book your service slot online in under 2 minutes.
Tap a service to book it
Full synthetic or conventional oil change with new filter and 27-point inspection.
Front or rear disc brake pad swap using OEM-grade compound with road test.
Refrigerant top-up, leak check, and cabin filter inspection.
Spark plugs, air filter, fuel injector cleaning, and timing check.
4-wheel computer alignment and dynamic wheel balancing.
ATF or MTF flush, filter replacement, and computer scan.
OEM or aftermarket battery swap with charging system test.
Full coolant drain, flush, and refill with premium antifreeze.
Belt, tensioner, and idler pulley replacement with water pump check.
Shock absorbers, struts, ball joints, and bushings inspection.
Muffler, catalytic converter, and pipe inspection and replacement.
Interior vacuuming, exterior wash, wax, and trim restoration.
Select all concerns that apply to your vehicle:

CheckBox.android:text: 🔧 Engine — knocking, misfires, or rough idle
🛑 Brakes — squealing, grinding, or soft pedal
❄️ Air-Con — not cooling or unusual odour
⚡ Electrical — battery, lights, or dashboard warnings
🛞 Tires / Wheels — vibration, pulling, or uneven wear
🛢️ Oil / Fluids — leaks or low fluid levels
💨 Exhaust — smoke colour changes or loud noise

EditText.android:hint: Describe any other issues or details about your vehicle…

TextView.android:text: No appointments yet.\nBook your first service!
